examples: We were just like boys in a sandpit.
There was a sandpit, a seesaw and a swing in the playground.
The long-awaited StarCraft II may end up with the community the size of the kinder-garden sandpit.
After all, sometimes life-long friendships get forged in the sandpit at the playground, so why not in this one?
It was shot in Tunisia, but part of the crucifixion scene had to be filmed in a sandpit in Kent.
